fields.name: ebooks
fields.description: PDF guides, manuals, and e-books across all topics — business, lifestyle, health and more.

fields.name: online_courses
fields.description: Video-based online courses and access codes for professional and personal development.

fields.name: software
fields.description: Digital tools, plugins, and software licences available for instant download.

fields.name: templates
fields.description: Ready-to-use templates for Canva, Excel, Notion, and more productivity tools.

fields.name: stock_media
fields.description: Stock photos, music tracks, and video clips for creative projects and commercial use.

fields.name: The Complete Freelancer's Blueprint 2026
fields.description: Your ultimate guide to building a sustainable freelance career. This comprehensive 200-page e-book covers client acquisition, pricing strategies, contract templates, tax tips, and systems to scale your income to €10K/month. Delivered as a PDF with free lifetime updates.

fields.name: Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp
fields.description: 32 hours of video content covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Includes downloadable source code, 10 real-world projects, and a certificate of completion. Lifetime access with quarterly content updates. Access code sent immediately after purchase.

fields.name: Ultimate Notion Life OS — 2026 Edition
fields.description: Transform your productivity with this complete Notion workspace template. Includes habit tracker, project manager, financial dashboard, reading list, travel planner, and 50+ page templates. Works with free Notion account. Instructions and video walkthrough included.

fields.name: Dropshipping Empire: Build Your €10K/Month Store
fields.description: The step-by-step guide to building a profitable dropshipping business from scratch. Learn niche research, supplier sourcing, store design, Facebook ads, and email marketing. Includes 15 pre-built store templates and 50 winning product ideas. PDF format with lifetime updates.

fields.name: SEO PowerSuite Pro — Lifetime Licence
fields.description: Professional SEO toolkit with keyword research, site auditing, backlink analysis, and rank tracking. One-time purchase lifetime licence — no monthly fees. Works on Windows and Mac. Instant download with installation guide and 24/7 email support.

fields.name: Premium Stock Photo Bundle — 500 Images
fields.description: 500 high-resolution (4K) stock photos covering business, technology, lifestyle, nature, and food. Commercial licence included — use in client projects, websites, and marketing materials. Delivered as a ZIP download with folders organised by category.

fields.name: Social Media Marketing Masterclass
fields.description: Learn to build an engaged following and convert followers into customers across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn and YouTube. 18 hours of content covering content strategy, Reels, paid ads, and analytics. Includes swipe files, caption templates, and content calendar.

fields.name: Canva Social Media Kit — 200 Templates
fields.description: 200 professionally designed Canva templates for Instagram posts, stories, Reels covers, Facebook ads, LinkedIn banners, and YouTube thumbnails. Simply drag and drop your images and text. Commercial use licence included. New templates added monthly.

fields.name: The Irish Tax & Small Business Guide 2026
fields.description: Essential guide for Irish freelancers, sole traders, and small business owners. Covers tax returns, VAT registration, RCT compliance, expenses, and Revenue guidelines. Updated for 2026 tax year. Includes checklists and sample forms. PDF format.

fields.name: Royalty-Free Music Pack — 100 Tracks
fields.description: 100 royalty-free music tracks for YouTube, podcasts, videos, and commercial projects. Genres include ambient, upbeat, corporate, cinematic and acoustic. Licence covers YouTube, social media, and client projects. No attribution required. Delivered as MP3 + WAV ZIP.
